$code..write: auth != null && newData.exists() && newData.child('uid').val() === auth.uid && (!data.exists() || data.child('uid').val() === auth.uid)

$uid..write: auth != null && auth.uid === $uid && newData.hasChildren(['state', 'lastChanged']) && (newData.child('state').val() === 'online' || newData.child('state').val() === 'locked' || newData.child('state').val() === 'sos' || newData.child('state').val() === 'away')

$nudgeId..write: auth != null && ((!newData.exists() && auth.uid === $uid) || (newData.exists() && newData.child('toUid').val() === $uid && newData.child('fromUid').val() === auth.uid))
